column1: # Reference data for the weather system in src/game.c (weather_name
# WeatherType enum order in src/game.h must match the first 6 rows here.
# vis_mod:    multiplier x100 applied to FOV radius (100 = no change)
# speed_mod:  flat penalty added to overworld step minutes
# encounter_mod: percent change to monster encounter chance
# region_weights: comma-free hint of where it favours (free text)
